summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Smart Student Management System. Fixed critical backend ObjectId serialization bug. All core admin, teacher, and student functionalities are working properly.

resolved_bugs.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error causing 500 errors on create operations
resolved_bugs.fix_applied: Added .pop('_id', None) to remove MongoDB ObjectId from response documents

integration_issues.issue: Logout button click doesn't consistently redirect to login page in test environment
integration_issues.note: Manual testing shows logout works properly, issue appears to be test timing

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent components

passed_tests: Admin dashboard loads with stats (students: 3, teachers: 2, subjects: 4)
Admin can create teacher (John Doe, john@college.edu, 9999999999)
Admin can create student (Alice Smith, USN: 1MS21CS001, branch: CSE, semester: 5, section: A)
Admin can create subject (Data Structures, CS301, CSE, semester 5, section A)
Admin can assign subject to teacher
Admin sidebar navigation works between all pages
All CRUD forms are functional and properly integrated with backend APIs
Authentication and authorization working properly for all roles

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (14/15 major flows working, 1 minor test script issue)
